description: Arcana Analytics builds embedded financial intelligence for mid-market lending platforms. Their core product is a real-time credit-decision API that combines alternative data (payroll, bank transaction, behavioral) with traditional bureau signals. Founded 2022, Series A closed March 2026.
funding_info: Series A $14M closed March 2026 led by Gradient Ventures. Total raised: $17.5M.
layoffs: No layoff events found in last 120 days.
leadership_changes: No leadership changes detected in last 90 days.
recent_news: Series A announced March 2026. CEO quoted in TechCrunch: 'We are building an AI-first credit intelligence layer.' Engineering blog post on LLM-assisted underwriting published April 2026.
